The '''''Avatar''''' was the personal [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Rufaan Tigellinus]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[Daniel Wallace|Dan Wallace]] originally named the ''Avatar'' in a segment of his Grand Admirals article ''[[Who's Who: Imperial Grand Admirals]]'' that was cut; the name was officially applied in a later article.
